description: Sixth cycle of autonomous improvements. Focus on i18n coverage for missing pages, keyboard shortcuts for common actions, contradiction detection integration, notes export, and additional test coverage.

userStories.title: Add i18n translations for ReviewsPage
acceptanceCriteria: All hardcoded English strings in ReviewsPage.tsx replaced with t() calls
English and Chinese translations added to locale files
Extraction table headers, status labels, and buttons all translated
Consistent with existing i18n naming conventions
userStories.notes: ReviewsPage.tsx has many hardcoded strings: 'Systematic Reviews', 'Create systematic reviews...', 'New Review', 'Create New Review', extraction column labels, status labels ('pending', 'in_progress', 'complete', 'failed'), 'Run Extraction', 'Extracting...', 'Export CSV', table headers. Add to the 'reviews' namespace in both en.json and zh.json.

userStories.title: Add i18n translations for ConceptsPage
acceptanceCriteria: All hardcoded English strings in ConceptsPage.tsx replaced with t() calls
English and Chinese translations added to locale files
Topic page section headers translated
Relation type labels translated (prerequisite, applies_to, contrasts_with)
userStories.notes: ConceptsPage.tsx has hardcoded strings: 'Back to Concepts', 'Generating topic page...', 'Overview', 'Key Findings', 'Related Topics', 'Research Directions', 'Concept Knowledge Graph', 'concepts', 'relationships', 'Search concepts...', 'No concepts extracted yet...'. Relation types in relationTypeColor() are hardcoded. Add to a 'concepts' namespace.

userStories.title: Add keyboard shortcuts for common actions
acceptanceCriteria: Global keyboard hook registered (Cmd/Ctrl+K for search/command palette)
Cmd/Ctrl+N for new chat in PlaygroundPage
Escape to close dialogs/sheets
Cmd/Ctrl+Enter to submit forms in writing and chat inputs
Visual keyboard shortcuts indicator in settings or help dialog
userStories.notes: Create a useKeyboardShortcuts hook in frontend/src/hooks/. Use react-hotkeys-hook if available, or implement with native event listeners. Check package.json for existing dependencies first.

userStories.title: Integrate contradiction detection into PDF reader
acceptanceCriteria: ContradictionReport component accessible from PDF reader sidebar
Shows contradictions between current paper and other papers in project
Click on contradiction navigates to relevant paper
Empty state shown when no contradictions found
userStories.notes: The ContradictionReport component exists at frontend/src/components/contradiction/ContradictionReport.tsx. The backend has a contradictions endpoint (check backend/app/api/). Wire it into PDFReaderLayout sidebar as a new tab alongside Notes and Related papers.

userStories.title: Add notes export from PDF reader
acceptanceCriteria: Export button in NotesPanel of PDF reader
Export as markdown file download
Export includes paper title, date, and all notes
Supports batch export of notes across all papers in project
userStories.notes: NotesPanel.tsx in pdf-reader components. Add an export button that creates a markdown blob and triggers download. For batch export, use the projects API to fetch all papers with notes.
